content.full_text:
January 9, 1991

Fair Political Practices Commission  
P.O. Box 807  
Sacramento, CA 95804-0804  
Attn: John Wallace, Legal Division

Dear Mr. Wallace:

As per your suggestion in our recent phone conversation, I am submitting the following for your opinion with regard to any possible conflict of interest.

I am currently a Real Property Appraiser with the Assessor's office in Orange County. I am considering the possibility of part-time work in the area of property tax consulting. Any such activity would be solely outside Orange County. Also it would not involve doing business with any individuals or companies that do business or own property in Orange County.

My understanding is that what I have described above should not constitute a conflict of interest. I would appreciate your opinion. I will be looking forward to hearing from you at your earliest convenience.

Sincerely,

[signature]

Daniel R. Hume  
1722 Mitchell #181  
Tustin, CA 92680
